title: The Passport Fourth (Amendment) Rules, 1979 (16.04.1979)
text: REGISTERED NO. D- (D.)-72 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (1), PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No 117] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, APRIL 16,1979/CHAITRA 26,1901 Separate paging is given to this Part in order that It may be filed as a separate compilation. 24 GI/79 (609) -- 1 of 4 -- 610 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA ^EXTRAORDmARYjmT_^-aEC._30^ MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, tho 16 th April, 1979 GAR. 246(E).~In exercise of the powers conferred by section 24 of the Passports Act, 1967 (J5 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Passports Rules, 1967, namely :— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Passports (Fourth Amendment) Rules. 1979. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the first poviso ta rule 6 of the Passports Rules, 1967 (hereinafter referred to as the said rules), clause (i) shall be omitted. 3. In Schedule III to the said rules, in Form EA(P)-I, for the existing Veri- fication Certificate, (he following shall be substituted, namely :— "I hereby certify that I have satisfied myself that the particulars in the above application for a passport furnished by ShrilSmt.JKum -- 2 of 4 -- 611 Son] Wife [Daughter of Shri arc correct. I regard the applicant to be a suitable person to be considered for issue of a passport. I have satisfied myself that the applicant is a citizen, of India. Office Telephone Residence Place Date Signature (Name in block letters) Designation OFFICE SEAL" [No. VI|401|22|78] K. D. SHARMA, Jt. Secy. PRINTED BY THE MANAGER, OOVT. OF INDIA PRESS, RING ROAD, NEW DELHI-110064 AND PUBTISHED »Y THE CONTROLLER OF PUBUQVTIONS, DELHI-110054, 1 9 7 9 -- 3 of 4 -- -- 4 of 4 --
